The '''SSK-7 Heavy Blaster Pistol''', manufactured by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]], was designed in the early days of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] managed to acquire large quantities of these weapons just before [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] edicts came about, making the purchase of such weapons illegal.

{{Weapon-stub}}
